programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.sub-title: I Want to Be Seen as Evil
programme.desc: (MA) Audrey watched her brother Jake’s obsession with the macabre grow into a deadly darkness. Now, she confronts the terrifying truth: he is most dangerous to those he loves.

programme.title: Does Murder Sleep?
programme.desc: (M) When a home invasion leaves Bill Ross murdered in his sleep, detectives scramble to uncover the identity of a pair of masked men. They discover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders
programme.desc: (M) When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the investigation uncovers a secret world of twisted sex, drugs and bondage.

programme.title: I Survived A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
